title: pteris ceilanica
intro: Pteris ceilanica, also known as the Celadine fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Pteris ceilanica include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and internal parasites, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Pteris ceilanica include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
